title: No Fade
description: Remove fade out animations in Minecraft
body:
# No Fade

Are you annoyed with the long transition animation when you load into Mnecraft? No Fade is a client side mod that removes all of those fade out animations in Minecraft. This includes the fade out from the Mojang splash screen to the main menu, and the fade out after reloading textures.

#

![Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/UltimateBoomer/mc-no-fade/assets/images/demo.gif)
